tests.description: ATDD RED phase Playwright E2E tests for the ThinkTank operations usage and completion dashboard.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: operator sees usage by workflow type, Quick Consult volume, structured workflow starts, completions, incomplete sessions, with tenant/date filtering according to permissions
AC2: dashboard surfaces unknown or malformed events as instrumentation gaps instead of valid zero counts
AC3: low-completion workflows can be drilled into through aggregate counts without raw private content
AC4: delayed or unavailable telemetry shows clear freshness/unavailable state and does not display misleading successful zero measurements
red_phase_notes: All Playwright cases use test.skip() intentionally for ATDD RED phase.
Network routes are registered before navigation or filter actions.
Selectors use accessible roles, labels, text, scoped rows, and dialog/table regions; no CSS class or XPath selectors are used.

fixture_needs: adminSessionFixture for authenticated UserRole.ADMIN operator sessions
advisoryAccessFixture for ThinkTank module access responses
operationsUsageFactory for fresh, delayed, unavailable, low-completion, and privacy-probe usage payloads
privacySentinelStrings fixture to prove raw conversation, prompt, report, and feedback text are not rendered
summary: Generated 6 skipped RED-phase frontend E2E tests for Story 6.1 covering operations dashboard filters, metrics, low completion drilldown, freshness/unavailable states, instrumentation gaps, and raw-content privacy.
